# KRN MCP STDIO Transport

## Status

[FACT] KRN has a local STDIO MCP transport over allowlisted runtime resources.

## Useful Pattern

The transport exposes read-only runtime resources and keeps proposal tools separate from target mutation.

## KRN Implication

Future MCP/API surfaces should preserve allowlists, schemas, idempotency, and explicit review gates before any write-capable workflow.

## Failure Mode

This becomes harmful if a local STDIO proof is overclaimed as deployed ChatGPT connector behavior, production API readiness, or safe destructive automation.

## Review Trigger

Revisit this note when KRN registers MCP in Codex config, exposes HTTP/API routes, or adds additional write-capable tools.

interpretation_caveat: This proposal is a reviewable request only; it does not approve memory changes, mutate source ledgers, expose MCP tools, prove dashboard readiness, or prove productivity lift.
